## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Jai, Adam (Sapphire Ventures) to discuss GrowthX and potential investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is an AI-powered content generation and marketing platform, founded by Marcel Santilli (ex-IBM, HashiCorp, Scale AI, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Company raised $12M Series A led by Madrona at $80M post-money valuation, with \~$5M ARR at time of raise](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Planning $50M Series B in September 2023, currently at $10M+ cash, 70 employees, and on track for 5x growth this year](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Platform uses AI workflows and human editors to efficiently produce high-quality, contextually-relevant content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Sapphire Ventures Background

  - [Manages \~$10B across funds](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Typically invests $20-80M checks](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Invests from Series B (single-digit ARR) to pre-IPO](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Strong focus on marketing tech (e.g. Hightouch, Segment investments)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Also active in broader AI space](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Offers portfolio services (recruiting, customer intros, M\&A support)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### GrowthX Origin and Business Model

  - [Marcel's background in content/marketing at IBM, HashiCorp, Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Started as workshops/consulting, evolved into productized service](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Initial traction: $1.5M ARR from 6 customers while Marcel was still DeepGram CMO](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Co-founder Daniel (ex-IFTTT) joined to build scalable infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Now combines AI workflows with human editors for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### GrowthX Technology Platform

  - [Custom-built workflow engine using AI coding agents](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Context-aware content generation with fact-checking and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [API endpoints for individual workflows (e.g. fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Visual content workflows (infographics, video editing support)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [CMS integration for streamlined publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

### Current Focus and Growth

  - [Primarily serving enterprise content needs (e.g. SentinelOne, Outreach, Okta)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Recent deals: $60K, $50K/month, $200K/month in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Expanding to sales enablement, hiring processes](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Planning more aggressive expansion post-Series B](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

### Team and Funding

  - [70 employees (25 engineers, 25 editors/"output bar raisers")](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [$12M Series A at $80M post-money valuation](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [$10M+ cash remaining, path to profitability if needed](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Exploring $50M Series B in September 2023](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule in-person meeting at GrowthX offices (near Sapphire's South Park location)](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Sapphire to consider GrowthX for potential Series B investment](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Explore potential customer opportunities within Sapphire portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/VETugygbSUxZdz3kzcrJdpMH6_fKFGiS?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
